vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The fix involves editing the Chrony configuration file to remove non-server directives, a straightforward change that does not affect authentication, critical services, or system boot. It is unlikely to cause lockout or system breakage.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: networking affected; Potential loss of time synchronization if misconfigured
